name: KarenHandel.com
subject: Overwhelming. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Handel for Congress, Inc
body:
Yesterday we emailed urgently regarding new polling in the Georgia Special Election AND how Democrat Jon Ossoff has outspent us by a 3-1 margin... | **Friend,**

This week we emailed urgently regarding new polling in the Georgia Special Election AND how Democrat Jon Ossoff has outspent us by a 3-1 margin...

**Your response? OVERWHELMING.**

You answered the call.

**You know that this is THE BIGGEST Special Election of the year. The entire Democratic establishment AND the liberal media want to defeat Karen Handel.**

That's why a group of generous donors have pledged to double-match every single donation made before midnight tonight.

[**Will you make an DOUBLE-MATCHED CONTRIBUTION right now to win the Georgia Special Election?** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838389:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)

**[Chip in $25 Immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838389:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)

[Chip in $50 Immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838390:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)

[Chip in $100 Immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838391:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)

[Chip in $250 Immediately >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838392:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)

[Or chip in another amount via this secure link.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42838393:sfRFLS28N:m:1:1857329133:DC331D63B42E7DBB858E8743511F902D:r)**

Democrats from across the country are flooding our district with resources -- our opponent alone has raised over $23 MILLION.

We can win this special election. But we cannot do it without your help, **Friend**.

Thank you,

Team Handel

| [ **CONTRIBUTE >>>** ]( https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/handel/list/gfc/donation1/?InitiativeKey=PNHNONQAFFS4)
---

| Paid for by Handel for Congress, Inc.
---

name: Americans for Prosperity Virginia
subject: Join us Tuesday in Prince William County
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

Keep your eye on the ball, because government officials want to tax you for it.
The Prince William Board of County Supervisors recently approved a letter of intent to build a baseball stadium for the minor-league "Potomac Nationals."
Just one catch: politicians and teams expect YOU to finance it! This new stadium could cost upwards of $35 million.
It's bad enough that taxpayers are on the hook to pay for a millionaire's stadium. But it's even worse that some Prince William County supervisors won't let the public vote on the matter.
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8f3da05f81c140bc02ed5345151f99a051d14dd1209295e2822568f7cf89e124719be992b658fce981ea5f8026ab86f91263a9ead4ff7ef2)
That's why we need you to attend the Prince William Board of County Supervisors meeting on **Tuesday, June 20, at 7:00pm at the James J. McCoart Building** (1 County Complex Ct, Woodbridge, VA 22192) and tell the supervisors to let Prince William County residents voice their opinion on the taxpayer-funded stadium through public referendum.
Corporate welfare is an expensive strikeout for taxpayers; Just ask New Jersey or Connecticut residents who paid _millions_ for baseball stadiums that stand [vacant](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8f3da05f81c140bceaa4bbb659014def6100ccf4ec16d7ec992851c5c82758f51ff1cab3573fa00d03e463399f66d0627661055930b75ffb "vacant").
Don't let Virginia be next! **Join us on Tuesday**.
In the meantime, [ **tell your local officials not to subsidize stadiums**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8f3da05f81c140bc7c799efdfa52c8ece0d371b804c2b659b4e6d341f2b8f79548395697a6f2a796e6c9595f4de2d4b4005aff4ef31fba73 "tell your local officials not to subsidize stadiums").
For Freedom,
Tyler MuenchField DirectorAmericans for Prosperity - Virginia
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8f3da05f81c140bc38ac0c2a2a508a261938eb2d68529876e19c339a7502c1a2cf1d6cf059bad8227d907dd993585325a6493bf4814c67fb)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

The Prince William Board of County Supervisors recently approved a letter of intent to build a baseball stadium for the minor-league "Potomac Nationals." Just one catch: politicians and teams expect YOU to finance it! This new stadium could cost upwards of $35 million. It's bad enough that taxpayers are on the hook to pay for a millionaire's stadium. But it's even worse that some Prince William County supervisors won't let the public vote on the matter. That's why we need you to attend the Prince William Board of County Supervisors meeting on Tuesday, June 20, at 7:00pm at the James J. McCoart Building (1 County Complex Ct, Woodbridge, VA 22192) and tell the supervisors to let Prince William County residents voice their opinion on the taxpayer-funded stadium through public referendum. Corporate welfare is an expensive strikeout for taxpayers; Just ask New Jersey or Connecticut residents who paid millions for baseball stadiums that stand "vacant". Don't let Virginia be next! Join us on Tuesday. In the meantime, "tell your local officials not to subsidize stadiums". For Freedom, Tyler MuenchField DirectorAmericans for Prosperity - Virginia

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: "repeal and replace"
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care. **Senate Republicans are negotiating in secret to repeal health care. Tell them to show us the bill now.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc95/4067b0a/2ba9f4d5a/7e6876b1/2856007927/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170617_dnc_nd&source=em_20170617_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc95/4067b0a/2ba9f4d5a/7e6876be/2856007927/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170617_dnc_nd&source=em_20170617_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc95/4067b0a/2ba9f4d5a/7e6876bc/2856007927/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170617_dnc_nd&source=em_20170617_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Tell Congress: Reject Trump's voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's time to call Trump's "election integrity" group what it is -- a voter suppression group. Tell Congress to reject President Trump's voter suppression.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c57/2fde7c66/42455fd0/15697cd7/1542331624/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/voter-fraud/cooper/?firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Last year, we won the closest race for governor in North Carolina history. As you may remember, Governor McCrory refused to concede and engaged in an all-out attack on our election system. He baselessly and falsely accused hundreds of North Carolinians of voting illegally. Now, President Trump is following the same model. He baselessly claimed 3 million Americans voted illegally during the election. **[It's time to call Trump's "election integrity" group what it is -- a voter suppression group. Add your name to tell Congress: Reject President Trump's voter suppression:](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c57/2fde7c66/42455fd0/15697cd7/1542331624/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/voter-fraud/cooper/?firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c57/2fde7c66/42455fd0/15697cd7/1542331624/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/voter-fraud/cooper/?firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Year after year, we hear Republican leaders peddling the myth of extensive voter fraud. But when folks actually look into the numbers, they can't find it.
Our democracy is stronger when more people take part in it. We should be finding ways to make it easier for people to register and vote, not harder. This new group is just the latest attempt by Republican leaders to suppress the vote.
**[Add your name to tell Congress to reject Donald Trump's voter suppression efforts.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c57/2fde7c66/42455fd0/15697cd7/1542331624/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/voter-fraud/cooper/?firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your support,
Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c57/2fde7c66/42455fd0/15697cd6/1542331624/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

name: Leila McDowell, EMILY's List
subject: 23 million Americans would be impacted >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c0d/1256822795/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact")
---

Peter,

I am really outraged over this.

Talk of passing Trumpcare is back -- and this time it's coming from behind closed doors in the Senate where 13 men are writing the bill in secret without a woman even present.

EMILY's List women should be in that room, fighting for the 23 million people who would lose health insurance under Trumpcare and every single one of us who could pay higher premiums, have our coverage reduced, or be negatively affected in any way by this bill.

**[Make sure women always have a seat when health care's on the table. Donate $3 now to keep our women in the Senate and send them reinforcements next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c0e/1256822795/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170617_email_SenateAHCA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Make+sure+women+always+have+a+seat+when+&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact")**

Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and his Republican colleagues could strip health care from millions of people, scrap the policy that provides coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, and gut coverage for women's health services -- including funding for Planned Parenthood.

These are the people who are supposed to be representing our best interests and holding Trump accountable. Instead, they've shut out the public and their fellow senators from the process in order to kowtow to Trump.

It's shameful.

The reason they're doing it is simple: Republicans are scared. They know Trumpcare's going to be unpopular, and our elected women have been the first to say so. Whether it's Claire McCaskill demanding a public hearing or Kamala Harris defending why Americans need accessible health care -- we can rely on EMILY's List women.

**Nine of the 15 EMILY's List senators are up for re-election next year. Without them, Mitch McConnell's voice is a lot louder, and President Trump's influence is a LOT stronger. Donate $3 to re-elect them and restore balance to the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Replace-These-Republicans](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c0f/1256822795/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170617_email_SenateAHCA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReplaceTheseRepu&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact")**

Thank you,

Leila McDowell
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c08/1256822795/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170617_email_SenateAHCA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact")**

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c09/1256822795/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c0a/1256822795/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a25/24c69fd9/db39441c/18e79c0b/1256822795/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact&source=WQEFE620N_digital_email_20170617_SenateAHCA_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

They know Trumpcare's going to be unpopular, and our elected women have been the first to say so. Whether it's Claire McCaskill demanding a public hearing or Kamala Harris defending why Americans need accessible health care -- we can rely on EMILY's List women. Nine of the 15 EMILY's List senators are up for re-election next year. Without them, Mitch McConnell's voice is a lot louder, and President Trump's influence is a LOT stronger. Donate $3 to re-elect them and restore balance to the Senate: "" Thank you, Leila McDowell Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: stephanie@dscc.org
subject: McConnell's counting on sabotage, speed & secrecy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The Washington Post recently outlined the three tools Mitch McConnell and his fellow Republicans are counting on to repeal Obamacare:
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170617-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**Washington Post: "The Senate's three tools on health care: Sabotage, speed and secrecy"**_
Team,

_The Washington Post_ recently outlined the three tools Mitch McConnell and his fellow Republicans are counting on to repeal Obamacare:

* **Sabotage:** Trump is deliberately destabilizing insurance markets and forcing rate hikes in order to mislead voters into thinking Obamacare isn't working.

* **Speed:** McConnell just invoked Rule 14, an obscure procedure that lets him bypass normal Senate rules and fast-track this bill for a vote before the end of the month.

* **Secrecy:** Republicans haven't held a single public hearing on their repeal bill. They won't even release a copy to Democratic senators! Instead, a bunch of guys negotiating behind closed doors want to decide the fate of our health care.

[**The only way for us to stop the GOP 's underhanded schemes to repeal Obamacare is to publicly call out their support for this disastrous bill. Chip in $1 now to fund our health care ads before it's too late.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170617-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Now that McConnell has invoked Rule 14 and decided to move the repeal bill forward without any public hearings or debate, a vote could happen at any moment.

And as _the Washington Post_ reported, "moving fast leaves opponents, and the public, with no time to catch up to the details."

It's essential that we ramp up our efforts to stop this bill right now, team, before McConnell calls a vote.

**Chip in $1 now to fund our ads and publicly pressure Republicans to drop their reckless repeal plan:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/ramp-up-to-stop-obamacare**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170617-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Stephanie Nielsen
DSCC Research Director

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5da/2b07114c/2cd9cafe/7310aa92/2848306334/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5da/2b07114c/2cd9cafe/7310aa8d/2848306334/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5da/2b07114c/2cd9cafe/7310aa8c/2848306334/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Virginia's next governor
body:
Help elect Ralph Northam in Virginia
---
**Say you're in to elect Ralph Northam in Virginia and Democrats around the country.
**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e68754f/2950341105/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd")****
On Tuesday, Democrats across Virginia showed just how energized they are to take on Trump and the GOP, and nominated Ralph Northam to be our party's candidate for governor. Now, the race to November is on -- and Ralph needs our help.

**[This is a pivotal moment, Derek. Say you're in to give Ralph a running start in the general election and help elect Democrats this year.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e68754c/2950341105/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+This+is+a+pivotal+momentCUSTOMDATASETslu&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd")**

We need to do everything we can to make sure Ralph becomes Virginia's next governor. He's a champion for our party's progressive values who will fight for hardworking Virginia families and stand up to Donald Trump's dangerous agenda.

But we can't stop there. We've got to win up and down the ticket in Virginia and elect Democrats who are running all across the country, from special elections to big-ticket races in November. And the DNC is the only arm of the Democratic Party that's committed to electing Democrats in every state and at every level of office.

**I know you're ready to help us win, Derek -- add your name if you're ready to elect a Democratic governor in Virginia and Democrats up and down the ticket:**

**[ I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e68754d/2950341105/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd")**
Thanks -- now let's get to work.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e68754a/2950341105/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e68754b/2950341105/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e687548/2950341105/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccae/4067b0a/2b9ad5538/7e687549/2950341105/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170617_tp_nd&source=em_20170617_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: the story of us
body:
#
Team --
Earlier today, we joined together with the other Florida gubernatorial candidates for a forum with the Democratic Progressive Caucus. The excitement around Team Gillum in the room was inspiring -- and I am so grateful for the supporters who cheered us on.
Today's forum demonstrated that we can win this campaign. But energy doesn't win elections alone. Standing ovations don't count at the ballot box.
If we're going to win this campaign, it will be through the power of thousands of people like you and me working together to earn every vote - from every county and corner - of this state. We need to reach out through every medium to spread our message across Florida. And that's why I'm asking:
[**Will you join together with our people-powered movement to make this victory possible by chipping in to our campaign now?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ea/2126397346/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?refcode=em20170617-expressnb")
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$10](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ed/2126397346/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20170617-express") | [$20.18](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ec/2126397346/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?express_lane=true&amount=20.18&refcode=em20170617-express") | [$50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ef/2126397346/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20170617-express") | [$100](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ee/2126397346/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20170617-express")
---|---|---|---
[$250](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378e1/2126397346/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em20170617-express") | [Other amount](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378e0/2126397346/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?refcode=em20170617-express")
---|---
At the forum earlier today, I spoke about my family, and how watching my parents -- the two hardest-working people I know -- taught me a lifetime's worth of lessons about the importance of hard work and dedication. I talked about my grandmother, who taught me to stiffen my spine and stand up for what I believe in.
She taught me that the right fight is always worth fighting -- which is why during the forum I shared our victory over the NRA, so our kids can play safely in public parks. I told the packed room about welcoming Syrian refugees and immigrants to Tallahassee, because our values matter most when they're put to the test. I talked about how we married same-sex couples in Tallahassee when others stood in the way of progress. My grandmother helped teach me the courage to live my values, every day.
And because she was a woman of prayer, I was raised in the Church too. As Scripture tells us: Show me your faith without deeds, and I will show you my faith by my deeds.
Florida, you know what kind of Governor I will be because of my record of service.
Now, more than ever, we need a Governor who will stand up for us, a Governor who will live their values, and a Governor who doesn't shrink from a fight.
**With your help, I 'll be that Governor -- but we can only get there together.**
[**Will you chip in to our campaign now to ensure we have the resources we need to spread this message to every corner of the state?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ea/2126397346/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?refcode=em20170617-expressnb")
Like I mentioned earlier, standing ovations won't win this election. But together, I believe **we** will.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378ea/2126397346/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-june2017?refcode=em20170617-expressnb")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378e3/2126397346/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378e2/2126397346/VEsHBA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3318/9e00690/4af9aadc/240378e5/2126397346/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
